title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 09 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 09 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 09 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/12/2025
Today, iron ore continued its weak and fluctuating trend. The main contract I2605 closed at 757.5, down 0.72% comparedto the previous trading day. Traders sold goods in line with market conditions, while steel mills made purchases based on demand, with a relatively positive procurement sentiment.
